accommodations.text: Do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work.
accommodations.source_quote: Do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work.

accommodations.text: Allow a four-function calculator on non-calculation-skill tasks.
accommodations.source_quote: Allow a four-function calculator on non-calculation-skill tasks.

accommodations.text: Face the student when speaking and avoid covering the mouth.
accommodations.source_quote: Face the student when speaking and avoid covering the mouth.

services.source_quote: Speech and language therapy: 60 minutes per week; 30 minutes, 2 times weekly; provider: Speech-language pathologist.
Specialized academic instruction: 100 minutes per week; 50 minutes, 2 times weekly; provider: Special education teacher.

goals.text: Grace will accept a change in routine using a coping strategy in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Accepts a change in routine in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Grace will accept a change in routine using a coping strategy in 4 of 5 opportunities.

goals.text: Noah will use a self-monitoring checklist to review work before submitting in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Reviews work before submitting in 1 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: Noah will use a self-monitoring checklist to review work before submitting in 4 of 5 samples.

goals.text: Ethan will complete and submit in-class assignments in 4 of 5 opportunities without redirection.
goals.baseline: Completes in-class assignments in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Ethan will complete and submit in-class assignments in 4 of 5 opportunities without redirection.

goals.text: Oscar will maintain a topic across three conversational turns in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Maintains a topic for one turn in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Oscar will maintain a topic across three conversational turns in 4 of 5 opportunities.

goals.text: Given a grade-level passage, Aanya will decode multisyllabic words with 85% accuracy on 4 of 5 probes.
goals.source_quote: Given a grade-level passage, Aanya will decode multisyllabic words with 85% accuracy on 4 of 5 probes.
